entries.definition: rising and falling irregularly in number, amount, level, or strength; unstable or changing frequently
entries.exampleSentence: The fluctuating exchange rate makes it difficult for businesses to plan their budgets.

entries.definition: present participle of fluctuate — to rise and fall or change irregularly in level, number, or amount
entries.exampleSentence: Her weight has been fluctuating between 60 and 65 kilos for the past year.
